description: Deletes the task item comment with ID supplied in path. Returns an empty body if successful.

schema.description: Normal view of task item comment

comment.description: The actual message of the comment

status.description: The status of the task item at the time this comment was created

id.description: Unique identifier of the login information.

name.description: The name that is associated with the login information.

login.description: The email address that is associated with the login information.

task_item_id.description: The task item id associated with the comment

created_at.description: The UTC datetime for the creation of the resource in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The UTC datetime for the last update of the resource in ISO 8601 format.
